holdings.infoBox: QLV is an equity ETF with a total of 122 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.48%, Apple at 5.57%, Microsoft at 5.21%, Johnson & Johnson at 4.06%, and AbbVie at 2.21%.

overview.description: The FlexShares US Quality Low Volatility Index Fund (QLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a multi-factor-selected, market-cap-weighted index of US large- and mid-cap equities. QLV was launched on Jul 15, 2019 and is issued by FlexShares.
